name: Chicken and Pasta in Ginger Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, halved
1 medium Red bell pepper, trimmed and cut into strips
1 large Leek, white part only, trimmed and cut into 1-inch half rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients in a bowl and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, heat a little olive oil over medium heat. Add leek and pepper; sauté for about 3 minutes until vegetables begin to wilt. Remove vegetables from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add chicken to the skillet (and more olive oil if necessary) and cook in the vegetable juices until no longer pink. Return vegetables to the skillet.
4. Stir in the sauce mixture; bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes.
5. Prick chicken with a fork several times to let juices seep in.
6. While cooking chicken, bring a large pot of water to a boil over high heat. Dissolve bouillon cube in boiling water.
7. Add spaghetti to the boiling water; cook until desired doneness is reached.
8. Transfer pasta and cooked chicken to a serving bowl. Arrange vegetables and sauce on top; serve and enjoy!
